name: claude-finance-kit
description: Vietnamese stock market analysis toolkit for Claude Code. Covers stock analysis, market research, technical analysis, fundamental analysis, macro research, news crawling, and batch data collection.

plugins.name: claude-finance-kit
plugins.description: Vietnamese stock market analysis toolkit for Claude Code. Skill: finance-kit (orchestrator + stock analysis, market research, news sentiment, screening). Agents: fundamental-analyst, technical-analyst, macro-researcher, lead-analyst. Data sources: VCI, KBS, MAS, VND, FMP, Perplexity.
